successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave-application.service.ts exists and exports ILeaveApplicationService interface and LeaveApplicationService class with all method signatures
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with findById and findByEmployeeId method signatures
LeaveApplicationService constructor properly declares dependency on ILeaveRepository
The getLeaveRequestById and getLeaveRequestsByEmployee methods are implemented using the repository stub

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Modular monolith architecture with dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, leave -> notification
LeaveRequest lifecycle states are Pending, Approved, and Rejected
Balance deductions occur only during approveLeaveRequest
Notifications are created on submission, approval, and rejection events
outOfScope: Implementation of state-changing methods (createLeaveRequest, submitLeaveRequest, cancelLeaveRequest)
